---
author: Sam White
toc-title: Contents
toc-depth: 5
toc-location: left
title: Resazurin Assays - Selected Juvenile Ruditapes philippinarum Exposed to 36C Acute Heat Stress
date: '2026-04-01'
draft: false
engine: knitr
categories: 
  - "2026"
  - "resazurin"
  - "Ruditapes philippinarum"
  - "Manila clam"
  - "Synergy HTX"
---
# INTRO
